'''David Nestelle''' is a colorist who did [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (comic series)|''The Phantom Menace'' comic adaption]], ''[[Star Wars: River of Chaos]]'', ''[[Star Wars Handbook]]'', ''[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution]]'', ''[[Star Wars: Republic: Prelude to Rebellion]]'', [[Star Wars: Jedi Quest (comic series)|''Jedi Quest'']], "[[Bailed Out]]," "[[Descent (comic story)|Descent]]," and various [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''Rogue Squadron'']] and [[Star Wars: Chewbacca (Dark Horse)|''Star Wars: Chewbacca'']] comics.

{{Artist-stub}}
